summary: Fashion products website with Pinterest integration
architectural_notes: Category-based product navigation with expandable sections

existing_features.title: Implement product browsing interface displaying fashion products in a grid layout with product images, names, prices, and categories
Add Pinterest integration allowing users to link products to Pinterest pins by storing Pinterest pin URLs or IDs with each product
Create product detail view showing full product information including name, description, price, category, large product image, and Pinterest pin link
Implement admin interface for authenticated users to add, edit, and delete fashion products with form validation
Add category filtering to allow users to browse products by fashion category (e.g., dresses, shoes, accessories)

Design a cohesive visual theme inspired by fashion e-commerce aesthetics with elegant typography, a sophisticated color palette (avoiding blue and purple), clean whitespace, and modern layout patterns that emphasize product imagery
Add the uploaded image 'ms_df88y_512_388205135.jpg' to the product browsing page below the hero banner section

Add a clickable 'Look Out' button below the image that redirects to the Meesho affiliate URL: https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:youtube_long_form:1998242?p_id=388205135&ext_id=6f4kzz&utm_source=youtube_long_form
Add the uploaded image 'ms_9wecb_512_690945320.jpg' to the product browsing page, positioned on the right side below the existing promotional section

Add a 'Look Out' button below the newly added image that redirects to the Meesho affiliate URL: https://www.meesho.com/af_invite/234223027:youtube_long_form:1998930?p_id=690945320&ext_id=bfdctk&utm_source=youtube_long_form when clicked

Add the uploaded images (1771838406102.png, 1771838406102-1.png, 1771838406102-2.png, 1771838406102-3.png, 1771838406102-4.png, 1771838406102-5.png, 1771838406102-6.png, 1771838406102-7.png) to the product browsing page positioned below the existing promotional sections
Create a category section where clicking on the first uploaded image (1771838406102.png) reveals the remaining product images (1771838406102-1.png through 1771838406102-7.png) underneath
Render the uploaded product images (1771838406102.png through 1771838406102-7.png) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/uploaded directory

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a product catalog backend with CRUD operations for fashion products including fields: name, description, price, category, image URL, and Pinterest pin ID
Add a photo with clickable lookout button that links to Meesho affiliate URL
Add image on right with lookout icon below it that redirects to Meesho affiliate URL (product ID 690945320)
Add clickable category feature where clicking an image displays related product images underneath
